chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 1650 of 2015 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For orders on CMA No. 9520/23 (urgent) 2.For orders on CMA No. 9521/23 (u/o 23 rule 1 CPC) 03.07.2023 Mr.Abdullah, Advocate a/w plaintiff --------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Counsel for the Plaintiff has filed an application under Order 23 Rule 1 CPC for withdrawal of the suit. Plaintiff is also present in Court and confirms that the matter has been settled out of the Court. Accordingly this suit is dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs along with all pending applications. J U D G E Ashraf
